Class XSystem

java.lang.Object
org.openxava.util.XSystem
public class XSystem extends Object
Global utilities about the system.

Author:
Javier Paniza

  • Method Details

    • _setOnServer

      public static void _setOnServer()
      Does that onServer returns true. Must to be called from a static block in a common base class of EJB, or in all EJB is there aren't base class.

    • onClient

      public static boolean onClient()
      If we are in a client: java application, applet, servlet, jsp, etc.

    • onServer

      public static boolean onServer()
      If we are in a EJB server.
